highlights: Production-grade agent security and validation are taking center stage, highlighted by the introduction of automated dynamic red-teaming (RIFT-Bench) and compilable reasoning trace verifiers (VeryTrace).

Hardware-software co-design reaches a new milestone with OpenAI and Broadcom co-developing 'Jalapeño', a custom silicon chip designed to drastically optimize scaling and energy efficiency for LLM inference.

The open-source ecosystem is shifting from raw fine-tuning to advanced reasoning distillation (SGPO) and structured, edge-optimized paradigms like shared cross-origin model storage for browser-based AI.

agents.title: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
agents.summary: A novel graph-based dynamic red-teaming framework that automatically extracts agent structures and deploys adaptive adversarial probes to systematically evaluate system security.

agents.title: ReMMD-Agent: Realistic Multilingual Multi-Image Agentic Verification
agents.summary: An agentic verification framework utilizing a persistent-memory architecture to decompose complex, multilingual, and multi-image posts into atomic claims for robust misinformation detection.

agents.title: Agentic Resource Discovery: Let agents search
agents.summary: A new architectural design allowing autonomous AI agents to dynamically discover, search, and integrate unknown external APIs and resources to solve complex tasks.

models.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
models.summary: A major update to the GLM model series optimized specifically for high-context coherence and executing multi-step operational agent workflows over extended horizons.

models.title: Improving Health Intelligence in ChatGPT with GPT-5.5 Instant
models.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-5.5 Instant, featuring advanced clinical reasoning, sharper context management, and physician-validated safety protocols for medical and wellness workflows.

models.title: Beyond Trajectory Imitation: Strategy-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
models.summary: Introduces SGPO, a reinforcement learning method that distills reusable problem-solving strategies rather than static trajectories, showing major accuracy gains across math benchmarks.

tools.title: VeryTrace: Verifying Reasoning Traces through Compilable Formalism
tools.summary: A zero-shot verification-and-repair framework that formalizes LLM reasoning steps into an executable Domain-Specific Language (DSL) to systematically eliminate reasoning errors.

tools.title: Deployment Simulation: Predicting Model Behavior Before Release
tools.summary: An OpenAI-developed methodology that simulates deployment environments using real-world interaction data to evaluate and fix safety and compliance issues before models ship.

tools.title: Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
tools.summary: Enables edge AI applications using Transformers.js to share downloaded model weights across different origins, drastically reducing cold start times and bandwidth usage.

companies.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil Jalapeño LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
companies.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have co-developed 'Jalapeño', a custom-built ASIC engineered specifically to maximize throughput and energy efficiency during large-scale LLM inference.

companies.title: Samsung Electronics Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex Globally
companies.summary: Samsung rolls out ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, representing one of the largest corporate AI deployments to accelerate software and operational workflows.

companies.title: OpenAI Launches $150M Partner Network for Enterprise Adoption
companies.summary: A major enterprise initiative backed by $150 million to establish global partnerships, helping organizations accelerate deployment, integration, and scaling of advanced AI solutions.

learning.title: Build Real Agentic Apps Using CUGA
learning.summary: A comprehensive guide featuring two dozen production-ready, hands-on examples built on a lightweight harness to help developers quickly build secure, real-world agentic applications.

learning.title: Beyond LoRA: A Deep Dive into Advanced Fine-Tuning Techniques
learning.summary: An educational guide exploring parameter-efficient fine-tuning alternatives that go beyond traditional LoRA, outlining when and how to deploy them for optimal model convergence.

learning.title: Is It Agentic Enough? Benchmarking Open Models on Your Own Tooling
learning.summary: A practical walkthrough showing how to build custom evaluation benchmarks to test how effectively open-source models can leverage proprietary API tools and workflows.
